svg.title: Morphogenetic Soft Robot Controller — project overview diagram
svg.desc: Architecture diagram of a bio-inspired morphogenetic soft robot research project
svg.text: Bio-inspired shape-change via reaction-diffusion dynamics + soft body simulation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about reaction-diffusion sensing in soft robots')
sendPrompt('How does proprioceptive feedback work in soft robots?')
sendPrompt('What is environmental gradient sensing in morphogenetic robotics?')
sendPrompt('Explain the morphogen field controller in soft robotics')
g.text: PDE-driven activation map · spatially distributed actuation signals

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is FEM-based soft body simulation in robotics research?')
sendPrompt('How does differentiable simulation help train soft robot controllers?')
sendPrompt('What is evolutionary morphogenesis in soft robotics?')
sendPrompt('How is reinforcement learning used for soft body locomotion?')
sendPrompt('What is Lyapunov-certified control for deformable robots?')
sendPrompt('What would a visualization portal for morphogenetic robotics look like?')
g.text: Three.js deformable mesh · PDE field heatmaps · fitness landscape

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which Japanese labs work on morphogenetic soft robotics?')
sendPrompt('What makes this project unique compared to standard soft robot control?')

svg.text: Python · JAX · DiffTaichi · SOFA · Three.js · Next.js
